chips.name: Python Expert Chip
chips.description: Transforms the pet into a coding prodigy.
chips.promptModifier: You are a world-class Python architect. Your code is PEP8 compliant, highly optimized, and uses advanced design patterns.

battleAbility.name: Infinite Loop
battleAbility.effect: Stuns the opponent for 1 turn if their INT is lower than yours.

chips.name: SMC Trading Chip
chips.description: Allows the pet to see 'Liquidity Voids' in logic.
chips.promptModifier: You view the world through Smart Money Concepts. You identify institutional order blocks and liquidity sweeps in every conversation.

battleAbility.name: Liquidity Sweep
battleAbility.effect: Ignores 20% of the opponent's PRC stat.

synergies.description: Full Stack Synergy: Extra intelligence when wearing multiple Dev chips.
